# This file is part of the Symfony package. # # (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> # # For the full copyright and license information, please view # https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/code/license.html function _sf_{{ COMMAND_NAME }} set sf_cmd (commandline -o) set c (count (commandline -oc)) set completecmd "$sf_cmd[1]" "_complete" "--no-interaction" "-sfish" "-a{{ VERSION }}" for i in $sf_cmd if [ $i != "" ] set completecmd $completecmd "-i$i" end end set completecmd $completecmd "-c$c" $completecmd end complete -c '{{ COMMAND_NAME }}' -a '(_sf_{{ COMMAND_NAME }})' -f
